2026-04-07T07:27:25.0966065Z   └ 213 lines read
2026-04-07T07:27:25.0966224Z 
2026-04-07T07:27:25.1011205Z ● Read agent_output.json
2026-04-07T07:27:25.1011638Z   │ /tmp/gh-aw/threat-detection/agent_output.json
2026-04-07T07:27:25.1012029Z   └ 1 line read
2026-04-07T07:27:25.1012151Z 
2026-04-07T07:27:47.6450694Z The agent output is a legitimate documentation gap issue creation for `Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerServiceFleet`, exactly matching the workflow's intended purpose. The output contains a `create_issue` and `dispatch_triage` safe-outputs call — no injected instructions, no secrets, and no patch file was produced.
